translations.vi: Ông tôi là một vị thánh.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing in gender and number with the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite form of the copular verb used to link subject and predicate.
Adjective used predicatively; masculine singular agreeing with the subject.

translations.en: That boy seems very good today.
translations.fr: Ce garçon a l'air très gentil aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Der Junge wirkt heute sehr brav.
translations.it: Quel ragazzo oggi sembra molto bravo.
translations.ko: 그 소년은 오늘 아주 얌전해 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个男孩今天看起来很乖。
translations.yue: 嗰個男仔今日睇落好乖。
translations.ru: Сегодня этот мальчик кажется очень хорошим.
translations.pt: Esse menino parece muito bonzinho hoje.
translations.he: הילד הזה נראה היום ממש טוב.
translations.tr: O çocuk bugün çok uslu görünüyor.
translations.vi: Cậu bé đó hôm nay trông rất ngoan.
translations.nl: Die jongen lijkt vandaag heel braaf.
translations.uk: Той хлопець сьогодні здається дуже чемним.
translations.hu: Az a fiú ma nagyon jónak tűnik.
translations.hi: वह लड़का आज बहुत अच्छा लग रहा है।
translations.pl: Ten chłopiec wygląda dziś na bardzo grzecznego.
translations.el: Αυτό το αγόρι φαίνεται σήμερα πολύ καλό.
translations.nb: Den gutten virker veldig snill i dag.
translations.id: Anak laki-laki itu tampak sangat baik hari ini.
translations.sv: Den pojken verkar väldigt snäll i dag.
translations.ro: Băiatul acela pare foarte cuminte azi.
translations.cs: Ten chlapec dnes vypadá moc hodně.
translations.da: Den dreng ser meget artig ud i dag.
translations.fi: Se poika näyttää tänään tosi kiltiltä.
translations.ja: あの男の子は今日はとてもいい子に見えます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite main verb meaning 'seem,' introducing a predicative complement.
Adjective in predicative function describing the subject.
Adverb of time modifying the clause.

translations.en: Your neighbor is a saint to me.
translations.fr: Ton voisin est un saint avec moi.
translations.de: Dein Nachbar ist ein Heiliger zu mir.
translations.it: Il tuo vicino è un santo con me.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的邻居对我来说像个圣人。
translations.yue: 你個鄰居對我嚟講好似個聖人。
translations.ru: Ваш сосед для меня как святой.
translations.pt: O seu vizinho é um santo comigo.
translations.tr: Komşunuz bana karşı bir aziz gibi.
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm của bạn là một vị thánh với tôi.
translations.nl: Je buurman is een heilige voor mij.
translations.hi: आपका पड़ोसी मेरे लिए एक संत है।
translations.pl: Twój sąsiad jest dla mnie święty.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς σου είναι άγιος για μένα.
translations.nb: Naboen din er en helgen for meg.
translations.id: Tetangga Anda itu seperti orang suci bagi saya.
translations.sv: Din granne är ett helgon för mig.
translations.ro: Vecinul tău este un sfânt pentru mine.
translations.cs: Váš soused je pro mě svatý.
translations.da: Din nabo er en helgen for mig.
translations.ja: あなたの隣人は私にとって聖人です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite form of the copular verb linking subject and predicate.
Adjective used predicatively; masculine singular agreeing with the subject.
Fixed prepositional expression meaning 'with me'; functions as an adverbial complement.

translations.en: The doctor was a saint to me.
translations.fr: Le médecin a été un saint avec moi.
translations.de: Der Arzt war ein Heiliger zu mir.
translations.it: Il dottore è stato un santo con me.
translations.zh-Hans: 医生对我来说像个圣人。
translations.yue: 醫生對我嚟講好似個聖人。
translations.ru: Доктор был для меня как святой.
translations.pt: O médico foi um santo comigo.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ đã là một vị thánh với tôi.
translations.nl: De dokter was een heilige voor mij.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मेरे लिए एक संत थे।
translations.el: Ο γιατρός ήταν άγιος για μένα.
translations.nb: Legen var en helgen mot meg.
translations.id: Dokter itu sangat baik kepada saya.
translations.sv: Läkaren var ett helgon mot mig.
translations.ro: Doctorul a fost un sfânt cu mine.
translations.da: Lægen var en helgen over for mig.
translations.ja: 医者は私にとって聖人でした。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite past form of the copular verb used to link subject and predicate.
Adjective used predicatively; masculine singular agreeing with the subject.
Fixed prepositional expression meaning 'with me'; functions as an adverbial complement.

Your neighbor is a saint to me.
The doctor was a saint to me.
